checklist.entry: Treat Wrangler configuration as the deployable contract for Worker entrypoint, compatibility date, assets and bindings.
After changing bindings, regenerate Worker types where the project uses TypeScript type generation.
Keep production, preview and local configuration differences explicit.
Do not place secrets in vars.
Use D1 database bindings for D1 access from Workers.
Use kv_namespaces for Workers KV namespaces.
Use durable_objects.bindings for Durable Object classes.
Use queues.producers and queues.consumers for Queues.
Use ai binding for Workers AI.
Use vectorize bindings for Vectorize indexes.
